person_name: Antistius Sosianus, praetor and former tribune of the people under Nero
person_name_full: Antistius Sosianus, praetor and former tribune of the people under Nero
notes: Roman praetor and former tribune of the people under Emperor Nero, known for composing libellous verses against the emperor.

docs.title: Annals, Book 16
docs.author: Tacitus
docs.excerpt: … to bloodshed, being himself too of a restless temper and quick to seize opportunities, made a friend of a man in like condition with himself, one Pammenes, an exile in the same place, noted for his skill as an astrologer, and consequently bound to many in close intimacy.
